picks.quote: I got early money on Amari by points and I broke that down extensively yesterday on the live stream. It's one of my favorite one of my favorite sharp props of the week is Amari on points.
I took Samake he was a dollar 20... I think Samake's one of my favorite young prospect / contenders.

I think we're going to see levels. Haruta's volume, her angles, her skill, her sharpness, her pace, her pressure. I think we're going to get one of these standing stoppages, hopefully. I'm playing a late stoppage.
I have Kiki to stop Sanchez. I just need a stoppage somewhere 1 through 12. That's one of my props.
I don't think Gyasi is at Catterall's level... I'm hoping Catterall doesn't I'm my stress is Catterall. I hope he doesn't make it look too easy cuz I got Catterall on points.

The reason why I think Fuentes is going to win he's bringing an opponent up three weight classes. We talked about this yesterday on the live stream. Fuentes is fighting a guy who last fought at 105. This fight's at 118.
